content:
🚀 VidBee | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Downloading videos and audio content from a wide variety of online sources through a desktop application.
✨ Key Features: • Download videos and audio from 1000+ websites worldwide • Built with Electron and powered by yt-dlp • Modern, clean, and intuitive user interface • One-click pause/resume/retry functionality
📖 Summary: VidBee is an open-source video downloader built with Electron and powered by yt-dlp. It allows users to download videos and audio from over 1000 websites worldwide through an intuitive graphical interface. Key features include support for numerous platforms, a user-friendly download queue, and an RSS auto-download function for background updates.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
